description: Scale the Flask API service in '/home/ga/scaling-app/' to run exactly 3 replicas behind the Nginx load balancer. Ensure the service configuration supports scaling without naming or port conflicts and that the Nginx configuration properly distributes traffic across the replicas. Verify the load balancing by recording the output of 10 sequential curl requests to http://localhost:8080 into '/home/ga/scaling-app/verification.txt'.
